title: A modification of Grothendieck’s spectral sequence
abstract: Let C, C′ and C″ be abelian categories where C and C′ have enough injectives and let F: C → C′, G: C′ → C″ be additive covariant functors. Then for an object X of C, let C(X) be the complex associated with an injective resolution of X. Grothendieck gets a first quadrant spectral sequence by taking an injective resolution of the complex F(C(X)) and applying G to the associated double complex.
